testcase.name: test_stores_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should have 'success' field assert 'success' in [{'created_at': '2025-11-29T11:16:33.207248+00:00', 'id': 'b45fcf1e-236a-4f69-af7f-d2c0cb49e2b2', 'last_synced_at': None, 'shop_url': 'ashmiaa.mystore.com', ...}, {'created_at': '2025-11-29T11:17:43.311278+00:00', 'id': '990ce187-997c-49e1-b7df-9684616a9b42', 'last_synced_at': '2026-01-04T18:50:22.971140+00:00', 'shop_url': 'tnvcollection.myshopify.com', ...}, {'created_at': '2025-11-29T11:17:55.951748+00:00', 'id': 'dd183156-1aba-483d-9cc0-77b48224210b', 'last_synced_at': '2026-01-04T18:50:25.699421+00:00', 'shop_url': 'tnvcollectionpk.myshopify.com', ...}, {'created_at': '2025-12-04T13:08:47.757887+00:00', 'id': '826e01f3-a38b-4900-b8c3-24b139ade54b', 'last_synced_at': '2026-01-04T18:50:27.868723+00:00', 'shop_url': 'ashmiaa.myshopify.com', ...}]

testcase.failure: tests/test_fulfillment_sync.py:238: in test_stores_structure assert "success" in data, "Response should have 'success' field" E AssertionError: Response should have 'success' field E assert 'success' in [{'created_at': '2025-11-29T11:16:33.207248+00:00', 'id': 'b45fcf1e-236a-4f69-af7f-d2c0cb49e2b2', 'last_synced_at': None, 'shop_url': 'ashmiaa.mystore.com', ...}, {'created_at': '2025-11-29T11:17:43.311278+00:00', 'id': '990ce187-997c-49e1-b7df-9684616a9b42', 'last_synced_at': '2026-01-04T18:50:22.971140+00:00', 'shop_url': 'tnvcollection.myshopify.com', ...}, {'created_at': '2025-11-29T11:17:55.951748+00:00', 'id': 'dd183156-1aba-483d-9cc0-77b48224210b', 'last_synced_at': '2026-01-04T18:50:25.699421+00:00', 'shop_url': 'tnvcollectionpk.myshopify.com', ...}, {'created_at': '2025-12-04T13:08:47.757887+00:00', 'id': '826e01f3-a38b-4900-b8c3-24b139ade54b', 'last_synced_at': '2026-01-04T18:50:27.868723+00:00', 'shop_url': 'ashmiaa.myshopify.com', ...}]
